title: A bold Pi gate: the permanent governing threshold that every valid path must pass under. The horizontal bar is the rule — immovable, structural, permanent. The two pillars enforce it. The governed opening below is the only valid passage; there is no path over, around, or through the material itself. Three solid shapes. No thin lines. No decoration. The architecture of law.
conceptualBridge: The Pi gate means Precept's rules are the governing threshold because the definition is the permanent crossbar and all valid paths must pass under it — there is no structural route around it, only through it.
decision: Shortlisted as the session's radical departure: vivid purple palette, new Pi gate silhouette, maximum structural weight, and the highest composite score in the set.
